---
title: Change-point detection of gaseous and particulate traffic-related pollutants at a roadside location
date: '2006-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- K. Ropkins
- M.C. Bell
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Environmental Science and Technology*'
---

## Change-point detection of gaseous and particulate traffic-related pollutants at a roadside location

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, K. Ropkins, M.C. Bell</p>

_*Environmental Science and Technology*_, 2006


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2006.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
